reviews.comment:
Muy bien la atención que brindan los empleados de esta estación de servicio ...
Muy limpio todo... y esto es realmente valorado cuando uno anda en la ruta por muchas horas...
Sigan así 👏👏👏👍

(Translated by Google)
The service provided by the employees at this gas station is very good...
Everything is very clean... and this is truly appreciated when you're on the road for many hours...
Keep it up 👏👏👏👍
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKNzYzdXNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay cola no se si hay muchos clientes o pocos empleados

(Translated by Google)
There's always a queue; I don't know if there are many customers or few employees.

reviews.comment:
Muy conveniente para cargar ya que la próxima estación está a 180 km. Es una estacion de auto móvil club asi que es súper completa y buen servicio. Suele haber mucho tiempo de espera para cargar

(Translated by Google)
Very convenient for charging since the next station is 180 km away. It's a Mobile Club Auto station, so it's very well-equipped and has good service. There's usually a long wait to charge.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKMWNxQVJnEAE
